# israel-nadlan-data

Public dataset repository for Israeli housing-rent benchmark data.

## Canonical Files

- `data/current/rent_benchmarks.csv`
- `data/current/geography_reference.csv`
- `metadata/manifest.json`
- `metadata/source_inventory.csv`
- `metadata/data_dictionary.csv`
- `metadata/release_files.csv`

## Interpretation

- One row is one benchmark observation.
- Check `metric_type`, `geography_type`, and period fields before comparison.
- The dataset is not a live listings feed.
